ddls:
CREATE TABLE "learning_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each learning activity */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the learning activity */,
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of learning activity (e.g., lecture, seminar) */,
  "number_of_sessions" INTEGER /* Number of sessions conducted for the activity */,
  "length" TEXT /* Length of each session */,
  "student_hours" TEXT /* Total student hours associated with the activity */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the activity */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course related to the activity */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor responsible for the activity */,
  "online_onsite" TEXT /* Whether the activity is conducted online or on-site */,
  "external_resources" TEXT /* Links to external resources */,
  "learning_objectives" TEXT /* Learning objectives of the activity */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learning_activities_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learning_activities_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learning_activities_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Structured Guided Learning) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic program */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisite courses */,
  "learning_outcomes" TEXT /* Expected learning outcomes of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "dean_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dean of the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the student belongs to */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic program */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year the student enrolled */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status of the student (e.g., active, on leave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance_records" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity for which attendance is recorded */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student attending the activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of attendance (e.g., present, absent) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific session within the activity */,
  "late_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student was late */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_records_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES learning_activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_records_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_records_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity being rated */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student (scale of 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the student */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific session within the activity */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor being rated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES learning_activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity to which the resource is associated */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., video, document) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the resource file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* License type of the resource (e.g., Creative Commons, Copyright) */,
  "access_control" TEXT /* Access control for the resource (e.g., public, enrolled students) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES learning_activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity being scheduled */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity will take place */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the activity */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the activity */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor for the scheduled activity */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific session within the activity */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students for the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES learning_activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Instructor, Student) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role assigned to the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Link to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course in which the student is enrolled */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade of the student in the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who graded the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity type (e.g., Lecture, Seminar) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity type */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the activity type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action undertaken by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
